item.title: Invention of sauce...
item.dc:creator: BenDoverTeeHeeHee

item.title: Y’all, it’s cookie season!
item.description: Ugh I’m a sucker for a frozen thin mint, it’s like a ski slope in your mouth. Which once typed out reads nowhere near as intensely delicious as intended. But I digress, on to the point of the post Y’all it’s that cookie time of year, and YES there’s a lot of weird shit around scouts in general and yes the profit thing is super fucked, but at least this is a way to directly help kids that could just use a peer group Double checked and it’s still activate and accepting orders Seriously though…freeze them if you don’t already. Put a ski slope in your mouth. Taste the powder. https://www.girlscoutsnyc.org/en/discover/girl-scouting-nyc/troop-6000.html
item.dc:creator: VaneloppeVonSchweetz

item.title: Just asked my sister this she say yes without heasatation
item.description: She followed up with a ill punch you for 1000
item.dc:creator: ElbowdeepInAfemboi

item.title: Hi guys. Here are some Pokemon I drew to traumatize the Pokemon Subreddit.
item.description:
Clefairy.
Bulbasaur.
Diglett.
Chikorita.
Jigglypuff.
Togepi.
Ditto.
Pikachu.
Smoliv.
Sprigatito.
Geodude.
Torchic.
Slowpoke. Thank you for your time.
item.dc:creator: DTSaranya

item.title: His intrusive thoughts won
item.description: He looks like a character powering up in an anime
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: A Lot of Dogs, Probably; a Thirty-seventh Dump
item.description:
Moving into fil's house after he passes, CON: I would have to go upstairs to poop, PRO: Iggy can have a lil yard
You're welcome.
18 years today. I tell him I hate him as often as I tell him I love him; he knows they mean the same thing.
I keep thinking at 3am that I have so much to do but I don't want to wake anybody up. What is the solution? Oh, being a human being with a sleep schedule that makes sense? Forget it then.
Do they? Partner is French but dgaf about Pokemon.
I don't know how and you can't make me learn! I mean, I know how, I just refuse to acknowledge that I do.
My TEXTILES.
Also spring-load my body so I pop out and scare people.
I love weird puppy-demons.
I don't understand people who don't like pizza. What's not to like? Bread-good. Sauce of some sort-good. Gooey element -gooooooood.
Make it two.
Mexican or Chinese.
I hate how the corners are cut.
Five stars, would order small snacks from cream corn noodle again.
I think I'm in my Dude Love era.
Don't do my boy Hook like that. But yeah, Weshausen is on.
What is this, a wrestling dump? Stick to dogs, idiot! ("I'm from Winnipeg, idiot!")
This was me last week but replace jncos with oversized yoga pants and rain with freezing rain.
Half the visitor's spots are full of snowbank. I would be pissed if I ever invited people over.
Every time my partner puts on a true crime video, me: "oh this one is crazy, you're going to like it!" Him: immediately loses interest
Anyone know if it's correct? Would make a cool tattoo if so.
I mean, I still can't drive, but that's my brain's fault.
Sounds lonely.
Especially when Iggy wakes me up by treading my herniated disc.
Am I a fake cheese harlot if I'm not into bleu?
I was happy being vegan until my mom needed catering help. I ate like 35 wings in the car and have felt like garbage ever since. But man. Wings.
I forgot what having a young dog was like.
Young spine terror in question aka Iggy tax.
item.dc:creator: AshesVonDust

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
accurate
what a newb
looks magical
good times
I would die for Monty
that’s unfortunate
mmm hmm
absolutely
for all of those times you need to quickdraw The Great Gatsby
it’s loud. get it?
yes
someone took time out of their day to make this
that’s so Reagan
the shit turns into farts
anything goes if you are on lunch
just throw the butter in the microwave for 5 seconds? bread doesn't look toasted at all? i'm confused
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: LEGEND!
item.description: Zach Wagner from the Arizona Miracle league, came to bat with the game on the line, called his shot than hits the walk off. The Miracle League of Arizona is a non-profit organization dedicated to providing a safe, successful and enjoyable baseball experience for children, teens and adults with disabilities or special health care needs. Zach is what legends are made of.
item.dc:creator: YELLOWTOAD

item.title: Germans singing against far right extremism
item.description: Song lyrics in different languages https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hejo,_spann_den_Wagen_an From the comments: Hejo, spann' den Wagen an" is the song this is based on. What they sing here is: "Fight back! Resist! Against the fascism in this land. On the barricades! On the barricades!" [Repeat] Wow! I am on FrontPage! Please send relaxing things you love to touch
item.dc:creator: Mika77m

item.title: Cue the theme song
item.dc:creator: TheBloodyLady

item.title: Show and Tell: Living a good life really is the best revenge. :)
item.description: ****Edit: two typos in the meme I made. Should say ‘names’ and only ‘my ex and his wife combined’ not ‘you my ex and his wife’ haha! That’s what I get for trying to type at 4:30AM when sleep evaded me. ****. I know it’s petty but I have felt so proud of myself and my family as we have absolutely thrived. It didn’t happen right away, but since my divorce 7 years ago I went back to school and started a new career that has allowed me to achieve so many goals and make my family my focus which is my highest value. I bought a brand new house that allows my kids to each have their own bedroom this year and have enough to give back finally to those who need support. I really don’t have ill will toward my ex or any bitterness anymore, but I do feel quietly cheerful at times that while he’s working a job he hates for 40 hours a week, I get to create my own schedule (weeks I have my kids I work only 25-28 hours) and be the mom I want to be. My kids and I all have very strong lovely relationships at last after some darker years earlier when there was a lot of parental alienation happening. I also love my work and find my life incredibly fulfilling. :) My favorite part is modeling for my kids that even when someone hurts you, you can leave and choose to live a good life. I love that they can see new possibilities and hopes for their own life based on what we have accomplished together. #domesticviolence #survivor #showandtell #singleparent #singlemom #hope
item.dc:creator: livfit4life365
